Reference Lines Type

Source: R/type_more.R
type_abline.Rd

Adds horizontal, vertical, or diagonal reference lines to a plot.

Usage

type_abline(
  intercept = 0,
  slope = 0,
  linewidth = 0.5,
  linetype = "dashed",
  color = "grey50"
)

Arguments

intercept

Intercept for abline (default 0). For hline: y value(s). For vline: x value(s).

slope

Slope for diagonal lines (only for abline)

linewidth

Line width

linetype

Line type ("solid", "dashed", "dotted", etc.)

color

Line color

Value

A cliplot_type object
